_notes: Canon Europa — Oracle/Salesforce estate on OCI + Azure. 5 workbook apps + integration/middleware layer.

apps.name: BizOps (Oracle SCM)
apps.desc: Supply chain management — order processing, inventory, fulfilment. Ship confirmation failures blocking revenue booking daily.

intel.activeIssue: Ship confirmation stuck — orders remaining in Shipped/Awaiting Closure status
causalChain: Daily monitoring report identifies stuck shipments
Support engineer reviews WSH errors in EBS
Manual reprocessing or data fix required
intel.recommendation: Auto-detect stuck ship confirmations via OEM — execute pre-approved concurrent request reprocessing

infra.label: Concurrent Requests
infra.detail: Ship confirm jobs queued — processing delayed

apps.name: Finance (Oracle Finance)
apps.desc: Core finance — AR, AP, GL, revenue recognition. DD authorisation failures causing 1-week MTTR and collection delays.

intel.activeIssue: Direct Debit authorisation failing — bank mandate issue causing invoices not picked
causalChain: Invoices not picked — bank mandate error
Canon IT resolves mandate in backend
Accenture reruns DD after 1 week — scheduled window
intel.recommendation: Automated mandate validation before DD run — detect and flag affected invoices pre-execution

infra.label: Oracle AR
infra.detail: Invoices not picked in DD run — mandate error

apps.name: Oracle EBS (Order to Cash)
apps.tech: Oracle EBS · Forms · Concurrent Processing · OCI
apps.desc: Order-to-Cash — Shipping Execution (WSH), Order Management (OM). Ship confirmation failures occur daily, 3-4h MTTR.

intel.activeIssue: Ship confirmation stuck — orders in Shipped/Awaiting Closure blocking revenue booking
causalChain: Manual reprocessing or DB fix required
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps monitors WSH concurrent logs — auto-reprocesses ship confirm for pre-approved patterns

infra.label: OTC Process
infra.detail: Order closure blocked — revenue recognition delayed

apps.name: CRM & Marketing (Salesforce)
apps.desc: CRM and marketing automation. Largest user base — 17,000 users. Critical for sales operations across 39 countries.

intel.activeIssue: No active issue — healthy. ZeroOps monitoring Salesforce→Oracle integration data flow.
intel.recommendation: Pre-emptive monitoring of Salesforce→Informatica→Oracle data pipeline for month-end integrity

apps.name: Pearlchain (CPQ & CM)
apps.desc: Configure-Price-Quote and Contract Management. 1,900 users. Critical for sales quoting and contract lifecycle.

intel.activeIssue: Integration data feed from Informatica intermittently delayed — CPQ pricing data stale
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps monitors Informatica→Pearlchain data freshness — auto-trigger refresh on staleness detection

infra.label: Pricing Cache
infra.detail: CPQ pricing data not refreshed from Informatica

apps.name: OAS (Oracle Analytics Service)
apps.desc: Business intelligence and reporting. Finance, supply chain and operations dashboards. Data freshness critical.

intel.activeIssue: No active issue — ZeroOps monitoring data pipeline freshness from Oracle EBS and Informatica feeds
intel.recommendation: Pre-emptive pipeline monitoring — detect Informatica feed delays before OAS reports show stale data

infra.label: Data Pipelines
infra.detail: EBS and Informatica feeds on schedule

apps.name: Informatica (Integration Platform)
apps.desc: Core integration platform — all data flows between Oracle EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain, Primavera. Failures cascade to all downstream systems. 2-3 failures/month, 4-6h MTTR.

intel.activeIssue: Integration jobs failed — unscheduled jobs, unprocessed files in transit directory
causalChain: FAM manually identifies all failed jobs
Reschedules unscheduled jobs, resets batch status
Moves unprocessed files from transit to landing
Triggers jobs manually — TAM admin dependency adds delay
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps auto-restarts failed jobs, resets batch status, moves transit files — eliminates TAM dependency

infra.label: Failed Jobs
infra.detail: Outbound and inbound jobs failed — unprocessed files in transit

infra.label: Job Scheduler
infra.detail: Jobs unscheduled due to failure — manual reschedule required

infra.label: Transit Files
infra.detail: Files in transit directory — not moved to landing

apps.name: Primavera (Project/Invoice)
apps.desc: Project management and invoice delivery. Informatica delivers invoices to Primavera. Header/line amount mismatches cause delivery failures — monthly 10-15 invoices, 1-2 day MTTR.

intel.activeIssue: Invoice delivery failing — header amount vs line sum mismatch
causalChain: Header amount and line sum do not match
NSO SPOC manually updates header/line data
Manually pushes for delivery — 1-2 business day MTTR
intel.recommendation: Auto-validate invoice header/line amounts before delivery — auto-correct within tolerance or flag for review

infra.label: Invoice Delivery
infra.detail: Header/line mismatch — delivery rejected by Primavera
